rawAssistant: Tomorrow's tasks are many, but for a road tightener, there's one thing that can't be rushed: attention to detail. Double-check the lanterns along the planks you mentioned earlier, and make sure they're secure against any wind or debris that might have accumulated during the storm. A loose runner could spell trouble on the road ahead.
